# Trust Layer for Inclusive Fintech Checklist

Version: `1.0.0`

| Status | Rule | Evidence |
|---|---|---|
| partner_required | Submission must be made by an eligible in-market fintech or financial-services partner. | `docs/partner_fintech_required.md` |
| partner_required | Solution must be live with active customers at submission time. | `docs/eligibility_checklist.md` |
| done | Trust layer MVP covers transparency, fraud prompts, consent, complaint resolution, and harm mitigation. | `docs/trust_layer_mvp.md` |
| done | Gender-disaggregated metric schema and reporting outputs are ready for partner data. | `docs/gender_disaggregated_metrics.md` |
| done | All 42 application-guide questions are mapped to draft answers and partner input fields. | `application/application_draft.md` |
| ready_for_authorized_session | WAIBAv dry-run and authorized final-submit playbook are prepared with a legal authority gate. | `automation/waiba/accion_submission_dry_run.playbook.yml` |

Deadline: 2026-06-05 23:59 EDT
